    <h2 {...{
      "id": "create-form"
    }}>{`Create Form`}</h2>
    <p>{`MetaFox provide form configuration feature to define JSON structure that frontend can be rendered via RestFul api.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-php"
      }}>{`

namespace MetaFox\\Core\\Http\\Resources\\v1\\Admin;

use MetaFox\\Platform\\Support\\Form\\AbstractForm;

class GeneralSiteSettingForm extends AbstractForm
{
  protected function prepare():void
  {

    // add form configuration
  }

  protected funciton initialize():void
  {
      // add fields structure
  }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Show form api in controller.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-php"
      }}>{`

use MetaFox\\Core\\Http\\Resources\\v1\\Admin\\GeneralSiteSettingForm;

class ApiController{

  public function showForm()
  {
    return new GeneralSiteSettingForm();
  }
}

`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "form-fields"
    }}>{`Form Fields`}</h2>
    <p>{`AbstractForm group related fields in sections, each section contains FormFields, AbstractForm add form fields in `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`initialize()`}</inlineCode>{` method. There are 02 sections
`}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`basic`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`footer`}</inlineCode>{` are support.`}</p>
    <p>{`Supported fields configuration is located at `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`./config/form.php`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
    <p>{`Create text field directory`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-php"
      }}>{`
$text = new TextField(['name'=>'firstName']);

`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Create via static builder`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-php"
      }}>{`
$text = TextField::create('firstName'); // get TextField instance

`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Create via builder service`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`use MetaFox\\Platform\\Form\\Builder as Field;

$text = Field::text('firstName'); // get TextField instance
`}</code></pre>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-php"
      }}>{`
use MetaFox\\Platform\\Form\\Builder as Field;

class GeneralSiteSettingForm extends AbstractForm
{

  protected funciton initialize():void
  {
      // section basic
      $basic = $this->addBasic();

      // add field
      $basic->addField(
          Field::text('general.site_name') // Create Text field with name "general.site_name"
              ->label('Name Of Site') // Add label
              ->description('Name of your site.') // Add description
      );

      // add field
      $basic->addField(
          Field::text('general.site_title')  // Create Text field with name "general.site_title"
              ->label('Name Title') // Add label
              ->description('Fill your site title') // Add description
      );

      // add footer structure
      $this->addFooter()
            ->addField(
                Field::submit()  // Add "submit", field use default name="_submit"
                  ->label(__p('core::phrase.save_changes'))
            );
  }
}
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`MetaFox comes with a list of build-in suppor form fields. Fore more information `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "/php-api/namespaces/metafox-platform-support-form-field.html"
      }}>{`checkout`}</a></p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "form-validation"
    }}>{`Form Validation`}</h2>
    <p>{`Validation configuration defines JSON structure to`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-php"
      }}>{`
Field::text('general.site_title')  // Create Text field with name "general.site_title"
   ->label('Name Title') // Add label
   ->yup( // add validation
    Yup::string() // Add yup string at https://dev-docs.metafox.com/frontend/validation#string
      ->required(__p('core::validation.site_title_could_not_be_blank')) // set required
   )
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`MetaFox comes with a list of build-in suppor form validation. Fore more information `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "/php-api/namespaces/metafox-platform-yup.html"
      }}>{`checkout`}</a></p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "yupstring"
    }}>{`Yup::string()`}</h2>
    <p>{`Add yup string at `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://dev-docs.metafox.com/frontend/validation#string"
      }}>{`https://dev-docs.metafox.com/frontend/validation#string`}</a></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-php"
      }}>{`
Field::text('general.site_title')
   ->yup( // add validation
      Yup::string()
        ->required(__p('core::validation.site_title_could_not_be_blank')) // set required
        ->minLength(5) // Set min length rule
        ->maxLength(64) // Set max length
        ->matches('^\\w+$')  // set regex match pattern
        ->lowercase() // Require lowercase format
        // ->uppercase() // Require uppercase format
        ->email() // Require email format
        // ->url() // Require full url format
   )
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "yupnumber"
    }}>{`Yup::number()`}</h2>
    <p>{`Add yup string at `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://dev-docs.metafox.com/frontend/validation#number"
      }}>{`https://dev-docs.metafox.com/frontend/validation#number`}</a></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-php"
      }}>{`
Field::text('general.site_title')
   ->yup( // add validation
      Yup::string()
        ->required(__p('core::validation.site_title_could_not_be_blank')) // set required
        ->min(5) // Set ">=" compare
        ->max(64) // Set "<=" compare
        // ->lessThan(100)  // Set "<" compare
        // ->moreThan() // Set ">" compare
        // ->int()
        ->unint() // Require unsigned int
        // ->positive() //  Require positive number
        // ->negative() // Require negative number
   )
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "yupdate"
    }}>{`Yup::date()`}</h2>
    <p>{`Add yup string at `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://dev-docs.metafox.com/frontend/validation#date"
      }}>{`https://dev-docs.metafox.com/frontend/validation#date`}</a></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-php"
      }}>{`
Field::text('event.start_date')
   ->yup( // add validation
      Yup::string()
        ->required(__p('core::validation.this_is_required_field')) // set required
        ->min('2022-10-10') // Set min length rule
        ->max('2026-10-10') // Set max length
   )
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "yupboolean"
    }}>{`Yup::boolean()`}</h2>
    <p>{`Add yup string at `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://dev-docs.metafox.com/frontend/validation#boolean"
      }}>{`https://dev-docs.metafox.com/frontend/validation#boolean`}</a></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-php"
      }}>{`
Field::checkbox('event.enable_close')
   ->yup( // add validation
      Yup::boolean()
        ->required(__p('core::validation.this_is_required_field')) // set required
   )
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "yuparray"
    }}>{`Yup::array()`}</h2>
    <p>{`Add yup string at `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://dev-docs.metafox.com/frontend/validation#array"
      }}>{`https://dev-docs.metafox.com/frontend/validation#array`}</a></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-php"
      }}>{`
Field::questions('questions')
   ->yup( // add validation
      Yup::array()
        ->of(Yup::string()) // define validator for each array
        ->min(2)
        ->max(5)
   )
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "yupobject"
    }}>{`Yup::object()`}</h2>
    <p>{`Add yup string at `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://dev-docs.metafox.com/frontend/validation#object"
      }}>{`https://dev-docs.metafox.com/frontend/validation#object`}</a></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-php"
      }}>{`
JobField::create('person')
   ->yup( // add validation
      Yup::object()
        ->addProperty( // add property
          'firstName',
          Yup:string()->required()
        )
        ->addProperty(
          'lastName',
          Yup:string()->required()
        )
        ->addProperty(
          'email',
          Yup::string()->required()->email()
        );
   )
`}</code></pre>

    </MDXLayout>;
